title: onosma helvetica subsp. austriaca
intro: Onosma helvetica subsp. austriaca is a plant species within the genus Onosma, commonly known as golden root or yellow gentian, a type of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Onosma helvetica subsp. austriaca include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Onosma helvetica subsp. austriaca is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be found in capsule or powder form, making it a versatile addition to various herbal preparations.
